channel.title: Zeitschrift für Anglistik und Amerikanistik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Anglistik und Amerikanistik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Stefan Hartmann, Alexander Willich DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: How Collostructional Analysis Contributes to the Description of Argument Structure Constructions with Slots for that- and Infinitive Clauses
item.description: Article by Stefan Hartmann, Alexander Willich DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2026

item.title: What Depression Feels Like: A Collostructional Analysis of Patient and Caregiver Perspectives
item.description: Article by Stefan Hartmann, Alexander Willich DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2027

item.title: Constructional Transfer in L2 Learning: The Role of Entrenchment
item.description: Article by Stefan Hartmann, Alexander Willich DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2028

item.title: Collostructional Analysis Meets Construction Semantics: Revisiting the English Way-Construction and Its German Equivalents
item.description: Article by Stefan Hartmann, Alexander Willich DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2029
